name: Nomadic Force

desc: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: You can Tribute this card to target 1 face-down Defense Position monster your opponent controls; destroy that target.
mnst_eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: You can Tribute this card to target 1 face-down Defense Position monster your opponent controls; destroy that target.
eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: You can Tribute this card to target 1 face-down Defense Position monster your opponent controls; destroy that target.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-down Monster Cards
